Purpose: Lists all seasons available via FastF1
Description: Use this to see all F1 seasons you can access (e.g., 2018–2024).

Description: Get all races in a year, including location and round number.
Retrieves a race weekend object to inspect sessions and dates.

Purpose: Loads specific session (e.g., FP1, Q, R)
Description: Main entry point to load session data like laps, telemetry, weather.

Description: Check which session types are available for a race weekend.
Must call this after get_session() to access session data.

Returns driver’s name, abbreviation, number, team, etc.
Lap of pit stop, duration, and total stop time for a driver.
Driver position through race laps for graphing or analysis.

Description: Speed, throttle, brake, gear, RPM, DRS, over lap distance/time.

Description: Convenience function to convert abbreviation to full name.
